spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — caret-shape: auto | bar | block | underscore for editable elements…

interactive.rationale: Shape buttons update the terminal input class, live CSS snippet, and computed-style readout; the command prompt accepts commands.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now frames the terminal as a text-insertion caret shape demo with block, bar, and underscore modes.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles real failure modes — feature detection, permission rejection, fallback paths are all wired into the script.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6106160780017664.

design_system.rationale: Raw terminal colours in visible snippets and inline styles were replaced with shared variables and scoped custom properties.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked block, bar, and underscore terminal shapes, then ran the help command. Computed caret-shape returned block/bar/underscore, invalid curly was false, command output rendered, and console/network were clean.
